positive: Stylized illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. Focus on a central arrangement of oversized, bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main subject is a gracefully curving tree branch adorned with glowing, abstract geometric shapes resembling constellations and exotic orchid blossoms. Include gentle, stylized silhouettes of whimsical woodland creatures (e.g., fox, moth, owl) interacting with the flora. The style should be highly saturated, modern neo-folk art with thick, crisp lines and strong contrasts. Composition must be balanced and highly repeatable for apparel printing. Use an ethereal color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, soft lavender, and luminous gold accents. Perfect for vector-like digital printing.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, low detail, watermark, signature, text, logo, dirty, sketch, photography, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts
